The stands here at Tokyo Racecourse are filled to
capacity, and you can tell from the cheers!

The object of the crowd's affection is the Otherworldly
Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka, number one in the first
bracket. Will she show us that runaway speed today?!

All eyes are on our racers as the autumn Tenno Sho...
begins!
Now, as expected, Silence Suzuka has taken an early lead!
Huff, huff... Hngh!

Having secured the lead, most would try to conserve
energy—but not Silence Suzuka! She's still going, faster
and faster!

No way! Do you see the gap between her and the rest of
the racers?!
I do. She's running as if this were a sprint!

Her running really is the dream of all Umamusume—one we
all wish to achieve.
Just how far can she get from the pack?!

Absolutely flying down the course, she's passed the first
1,000-meter mark!
And her time is... 57.4 seconds!

Just how far ahead will she end up? What will her time be
when she crosses the finish line?!

Still in the lead is Silence Suzuka! She's nearing the large
zelkova tree marking the third corner!
Hehe!
Huff, huff...
Huh? Ngh—
What's wrong? I can't move!
Ah...
Who's...
Suzuka!
Everyone...
I need to see it...

I need to show my trainer... and everyone else a sight to
behold!

Silence Suzuka has passed the zelkova and is turning into
the homestretch!
The crowd is going absolutely wild!
The scenery at the front... is all mine!

Silence Suzuka has begun her sprint to the finish line! She's
leaving the rest of the racers in the dust! No one could
replicate this kind of ability!
Yaaaaahhhhh!
In the lead is Silence Suzuka! Silence Suzuka!

With the hopes and dreams of hundreds on her back,
Silence Suzuka... crosses the finish line!

The Umamusume of dreamers everywhere, Silence Suzuka
has conquered the autumn Tenno Sho!
Huff... Huff
I did it...
I saw the scenery... of my dreams.
